heading: Credit of proceeds to particular project
label: 526 Credit of proceeds to particular project
text: All moneys or profits as determined by the Secretary heretofore or hereafter derived from the sale or rental of surplus water under the Warren Act of () [ to 525], or from the connection of a new project with an existing project shall be credited to the project or division of the project to which the construction cost has been charged.February 21, 191136 Stat. 92543 U.S.C. 523
notes: References in TextThe Warren Act of , referred to in text, is , , which enacted sections 523 to 525 of this title.
